---
title: "Integration exploration"
author: "Jonas Poppe"
format: html
editor: source
---


# Load Libraries

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse)
library(targets)
library(ggpubr)
library(here)

```

# Load data
```{r}
tar_load( daily,
         store = here("_targets"))
```

# Exploration of overlap


```{r}

coverage <- bind_rows(
  macrofactor_daily %>%
    mutate(source = "MacroFactor") %>%
    select(date, source),

  azm_daily %>%                          # uncomment when ready
    mutate(source = "Active Zone Min") %>%  #
    select(date, source),                  #
) %>%
  mutate(
    week      = floor_date(date, "week", week_start = 1),
    day_label = wday(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE, week_start = 1)
  ) %>%
  distinct(date, source, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(present = 1L)

ggplot(coverage, aes(x = day_label, y = week, fill = factor(present))) +
  geom_tile( linewidth = 0.4, width = 0.9, height = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values  = c("1" = anthropic$coral),
    na.value = anthropic$bg_card,
    guide   = "none"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~source, ncol = 1) +
  scale_y_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months") +
  theme_anthropic(grid = "none") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Data coverage by source",
    subtitle = "Each tile = one day with data. Gaps = missing dates.",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  )

```

```{r}
daily %>% 
  mutate(year = as.factor(year(date))) %>%
  mutate(rhr = if_else(is.na(rhr), resting_heart_rate,rhr)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = rhr)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = year), shape = 21) +
  geom_smooth() +
  theme_anthropic() +
  stat_cor() +
  scale_fill_health()+
  labs(y = "Resting heart rate (bpm)",
       x= "Date (Day)")

```

```{r}
daily %>% 
  mutate(year = as.factor(year(date))) %>%
  mutate(rhr = coalesce(ga_rhr, gw_rhr)) %>%
  mutate(rhr = if_else(is.na(rhr), resting_heart_rate,rhr)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = trend_weight_kg, y = rhr)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = year), shape = 21) +
  geom_smooth() +
  theme_anthropic() +
  stat_cor() +
  scale_fill_health()+
  labs(y = "Resting heart rate (bpm)",
       x= "Weight (kg)")
```
